entries.title: Sam Altman to Brief White House on OpenAI Models’ Impact on Work
entries.summary: OpenAI CEO Sam Altman plans to meet with White House officials and U.S. lawmakers next week to brief them on the company’s upcoming models and how they affect work, Bloomberg reported Tuesday (July 21). entries.title: Billtrust Debuts AI Assistant Connectivity to Promote AR Automation
entries.summary: B2B cash generation platform Billtrust has launched the “Billtrust MCP Server.” With this new offering, the company becomes the first accounts receivable (AR) platform to directly link live invoice-to-cash intelligence to leading AI assistants through the Model Context Protocol (MCP), Billtrust said in a Tuesday (July 21) news release. “Finance teams can now query their […] The post Billtrus

entries.title: Capital One open sources VulnHunter, an AI security tool that thinks like a hacker
entries.summary: Capital One has released an open source agentic AI security tool that scans source code for vulnerabilities.

entries.title: Natural raises $30 million to build AI agent payments stack
entries.summary: Natural, a US fintech startup building a payments stack for AI agents, has raised a $30 million Series A round led by Kirsten Green at Forerunner.

entries.title: Hasbro’s Adult Fans Power a ‘Magic’ 16% Sales Jump
entries.summary: Hasbro’s strongest growth in the second quarter came from an audience most toy companies chase last: adult collectors, hobby gamers and longtime fans. entries.title: Kalshi Moves Ahead with First Expansion Beyond Crypto Perpetual Futures
entries.summary: Kalshi turns previously disclosed expansion plans into a formal regulatory filing, with precious metals becoming the first traditional asset class covered. The company has filed an application with the Commodity Futures Trading Commission (CFTC) seeking approval to launch perpetual futures linked to gold, silver and platinum, Bloomberg reports . entries.title: Prediction Market Tournaments Reach Prop Trading as Tradeify Attracts 30,000 Participants on Plaee’s Platform
entries.summary: More than 30,000 traders took part in a simulated prediction market tournament hosted by proprietary trading firm Tradeify in one of the first examples of a prop firm using prediction-market mechanics. entries.title: Orion rockets past $6 trillion in assets as AI adoption accelerates
entries.summary: Orion today announced it has surpassed $6.6 trillion in assets under administration — up 29% since crossing $5 trillion one year ago.

entries.title: Kalshi Launches Pro Terminal as It Moves Deeper Into Professional Derivatives Trading
entries.summary: Kalshi has spent the past year adding CFTC-regulated perpetual futures and hedge fund clearing access. Its latest move addresses a different gap: the trading interface itself. The company has launched Kalshi Pro, a trading terminal built for active traders, professional speculators and institutional desks. entries.title: Oregon proposes BNPL rules
entries.summary: The state’s proposed rules would require buy now, pay later firms to obtain a payday or consumer finance license. A trade group countered the proposal.

entries.title: Payments broker gets jail time
entries.summary: The fraudster, who created sham online marketing companies to bilk consumers and businesses, was sentenced to three years in prison Monday.

entries.title: Analyzing the evidence that helps businesses win “product not received” disputes
entries.summary: To understand what can influence win rates, we analyzed evidence packets from one million disputes over a 16-week period. Here’s what the data shows and what it means for how you mitigate disputes.
